entities.name: source maps
entities.context: Mapping between minified code and original code for debugging purposes

entities.name: compress
entities.context: A transformation option in Uglify that optimizes code and affects source maps

entities.name: mangle
entities.context: A transformation option in Uglify that alters variable names without affecting source maps

relationships.context: Uglify provides a compress option for code optimization
Uglify provides a mangle option for variable name alteration
compress transformations adversely affect source map debugging
mangle does not adversely affect source map debugging
